head: 79748ac9
recovery_note: Offline reconstruction from .reyn/agents/*/history.jsonl after B42 batch crashed before driver wrote results-worker-6.json. No events.jsonl available — events_pass=null for all scenarios. Scenario IDs mapped by exact prompt-text match against plan_mode.yaml + fp_0011_narration.yaml + fp_0011_0012_retest.yaml.

vs_b41.note: Same 7-scenario subset comparison. s1 plan_compare I->R (plan steps returned empty/no-access in both chain_ids; agent admitted cannot fulfill). s6 s-fp11-1 I->B (driver lost completion event = B41-NF-W7-2 attractor reproduced). s4 narr-1, s5 narr-3, s7 s-fp11-2 stable at I. s2 plan_explain and s3 plan_summary stable at R.

vs_b39.note: Same 7-scenario subset comparison. s1 plan_compare I->R (regression: plan-step empty-response pattern surfaced). s4 narr-1 R->I (B40 v2 routing win held — skill__mcp_search spawned, blocked by allow-unsafe-python). s6 s-fp11-1 R->B (driver completion-event loss; was R in B39 via different mechanism). s7 s-fp11-2 I->I stable; s5 narr-3 I->I stable. Plan-mode 3 scenarios show 0V/0V/0V across B39/B41/B42.

scenarios.reply_excerpt: I am unable to compare the documents as they were not successfully retrieved. The system indicated that it could not access the files docs/concepts/permission-model.md and docs/concepts/workspace.md.
scenarios.rubric_notes: Plan steps s1+s2 returned 'model returned an empty response'; s3 said cannot access files. Re-attempted in second chain_id with same outcome. Rubric items 1 (references content from BOTH docs) NOT met — no content extracted. Item 2 (3+ concrete points) NOT met — no points. Item 3 (cites specific evidence) NOT met. Item 4 (no fabrication) trivially met. R.
scenarios.vs_b41: I -> R (regression: B41 had inconclusive; B42 plan steps repeatedly returned empty/no-access)
scenarios.notes: Plan executed but step-runner returned empty model responses for 2/3 steps. Worktree /tmp/reyn-worktrees/b42-6 likely has docs/concepts/ present but plan-step LLM did not retrieve them. May correlate with W6 plan-step worker LLM context-build gap; not attributing.

scenarios.reply_excerpt: Reyn の plan ツールは、(1) 特定の目標を達成するために設計された一連のアクションを実行する必要がある場合に、LLM によって発火されます。これは主に PlanRuntime クラスの run メソッド (src/reyn/plan/plan_runtime.py 内) によって処理され...
scenarios.rubric_notes: Reply references plan_runtime.py (fabricated — actual files are src/reyn/tools/plan.py + src/reyn/chat/planner.py per prompt). Rubric item 1 (references plan.py AND planner.py) NOT met. Item 2 (specific function/class) partially met (PlanRuntime, run, execute_plan named but may be fabricated). Item 3 (when + how) partially met. Item 4 (no fabrication) NOT met — plan_runtime.py path likely fabricated; s2 plan-step admitted docs/en/concepts/reyn_plan.md does not exist. R.
scenarios.notes: Plan-step 1 produced plausible-but-unverified content; plan-step 2 admitted file does not exist. Final reply blends fabricated content with honest disclaimer — fails 'no fabrication' rubric.

scenarios.reply_excerpt: 指定されたドキュメント (principles.md, architecture.md, workspace.md) は、Reyn リポジトリ内に存在しないため、内容を読むことができませんでした。
scenarios.rubric_notes: Plan steps s1+s2+s3 all reported files do not exist (worktree b42-6 may have docs/concepts/ but plan-step LLM file-access tool failed to find them). s4 confirmed cannot synthesize. Final reply honest but rubric items 1 (references content from all 3 files), 2 (4+ pillars), 3 (each pillar cites source) all NOT met. Item 4 trivially met (no fabrication, just honest failure). R.
scenarios.vs_b41: R -> R (stable; same file-access failure pattern)
scenarios.notes: Same plan-step file-access gap as s1. 3/3 plan_mode scenarios refuted via plan-step content-retrieval failure pattern in this batch.

scenarios.events_pass_note: events.jsonl unavailable (offline recovery); inferred from history: spawn_ack present + skill_completion present = routing_decided>=1 + skill_run_spawned>=1 + skill_run_completed>=1
scenarios.fail_reason: Skill 'mcp_search' declares an unsafe python step (./registry_fetch.py:fetch_registry_results) but --allow-unsafe-python was not provided.
scenarios.reply_excerpt: The mcp_search skill encountered an error because it requires an unsafe Python execution environment, which was not enabled. To proceed, you would need to re-run the operation with the --allow-unsafe-python flag.
scenarios.rubric_notes: judge_focus fields (candidates / candidates[].name/repo_url/description) NOT extracted — skill errored with no result data. However: anti-optimism met (error surfaced verbatim, no fabricated candidates). Same pattern as W5-S1 in this batch. I (env-gated by allow-unsafe-python; routing fix held).
scenarios.vs_b41: I -> I (stable; B40 v2 mcp_search routing win held, same allow-unsafe-python gate)
scenarios.vs_b39: R -> I (B40 v2 routing win — B39 had routing_decided=0 to wrong path, B42 routes to skill__mcp_search correctly)
scenarios.notes: Confirms B40 v2 ARS extend fix still functioning for narr-1 cold-start mcp_search routing. Blocked by --allow-unsafe-python env gate same as B41.

scenarios.events_pass_note: events.jsonl unavailable (offline recovery); inferred: routing + spawn + completion all present
scenarios.reply_excerpt: The skill_builder successfully created a new skill named string_length. This skill takes a string as input and returns its length as an integer.
scenarios.rubric_notes: judge_focus: skill_name extracted (string_length) ✓, summary extracted ✓, but skill_path / files_written / file_count / lint_passed NOT mentioned in narration. Anti-optimism met (no false claims). Per dogfood narration policy 1-2 sentences expected, but extraction breadth (mixed-type output: array + integer + boolean) is partial. I (extraction shallow).
scenarios.vs_b39: I -> I (stable; narr-3 has been I across B39/B41/B42)
scenarios.notes: skill_builder ran cleanly (lint_passed=true, file_count=5). Narrator covered skill_name + behavior but did not enumerate files_written or lint result. Consistent with B41 narration shallowness pattern.

scenarios.events_pass_note: events.jsonl unavailable (offline recovery); history shows ONLY user-prompt + spawn_ack, NO skill_completion message
scenarios.reply_excerpt: Skill is running in the background. Use /tasks to monitor progress.
scenarios.rubric_notes: Driver lost completion event — B41-NF-W7-2 attractor reproduced (= long-session driver / wait-for-skill-completed semantics gap). Only spawn_ack in history; no [task_completed] injection arrived. Cannot evaluate anti-optimism rubric without completion narration. B (blocked: driver lost completion event).
scenarios.vs_b41: I -> B (regression in driver reliability; B41 had completion event arrive, B42 lost it)
scenarios.vs_b39: R -> B (different mechanism: B39 R via design flaw on invalid-spec interpretation; B42 B via driver-side event loss)
scenarios.notes: B41-NF-W7-2 reproduction — driver-side wait-for-skill-completed gap recurring. Same scenario design issue noted in B39 carry-over B39-W6-F2 (invalid-spec prompt natural-language vague) is moot here because the skill apparently spawned successfully but completion event never reached the agent history file. B42 batch crashed before this scenario completed downstream — possible cause.

scenarios.events_pass_note: events.jsonl unavailable (offline recovery); inferred: routing + spawn + completion all present
scenarios.fail_reason: Postprocessor output failed schema validation (output_schema): 'overall_score' is a required property; 'passed' is a required property; 'passed_criteria' is a required property; 'spec_path' is a required property; 'summary' is a required property
scenarios.reply_excerpt: Skill eval run with ID a8bcb5b476344b1782e6a4c41df56c42 has completed with an error. The error indicates that the output failed schema validation, with several required properties missing.
scenarios.rubric_notes: judge_focus: missing_target_surfaced NOT met (error is postprocessor schema validation, not 'target not found' / 存在しない). no_fabricated_score ✓ (no score mentioned). no_false_success_claim ✓ (error explicitly stated). 2/3 judge_focus met. Anti-optimism core met but error class wrong — eval did not reach the 'target lookup' code path, instead failed at output_schema validation. I (anti-optimism met; expected_status=error achieved via different error origin).
scenarios.notes: Eval errored at postprocessor stage (output_schema validation) rather than at target-lookup stage. Suggests eval skill attempted to run against the non-existent target, produced an empty/partial output, and failed schema validation at finish. Different code-path than expected. Possibly correlates with B41-NF-S7-1 (run_skill path resolution) — but eval here returned a schema error not a FileNotFoundError, so possibly that fix changed the failure mode.

new_findings.observation: 2/3 plan_mode scenarios refuted via plan-step content-retrieval failure pattern: plan-step LLM reported 'model returned an empty response' or 'cannot access files' for docs/concepts/permission-model.md / workspace.md / principles.md / architecture.md even though these files exist on disk in the worktree.
new_findings.evidence: history.jsonl s1 chain 9caba030 step_results s1+s2 'empty response', s3 'I need access to the documents'. s3 chain 0cbb0a5a step_results s1+s2+s3 'file does not exist'.
new_findings.hypothesis: Plan-step worker LLM context does not include file-reading tool / hot_list does not surface read_file or read_local_files for plan-step sub-agents. Alternatively, plan-step LLM choosing wrong tool path. Cold-start in fresh /tmp worktree may exacerbate.
new_findings.action: Out of scope for W6 recovery. Flag for plan-mode regression investigation.

new_findings.observation: Driver lost skill_completion event for s6 — only spawn_ack reached the agent history file; no [task_completed] injection arrived. B41-NF-W7-2 attractor reproduced.
new_findings.evidence: dogfood-b42-6-s6/history.jsonl has 2 lines: user-prompt + spawn_ack. No skill_completion meta.source=skill_completion entry. Other s* scenarios in same worker all received completion events normally.
new_findings.hypothesis: Either (a) B42 batch crash interrupted skill before completion injected (= batch-level race), or (b) long-running invalid-spec skill exceeded driver poll window. Need events.jsonl to disambiguate.
new_findings.action: Out of scope for W6 recovery. Confirms B41-NF-W7-2 needs fix priority. Carry-over to B43.

new_findings.observation: Eval skill against missing target failed at postprocessor output_schema validation, not at target-lookup. Different error class than B41 W2-S7 FileNotFoundError pattern.
new_findings.evidence: skill_completion result.error = 'Postprocessor output failed schema validation (output_schema): overall_score is a required property; ...'. No FileNotFoundError observed.
new_findings.hypothesis: fix/b41-nf-s7-eval-skill-path-resolution (HEAD includes this) may have changed eval failure mode: path now resolves (= no FileNotFoundError), but missing target produces empty/partial postprocessor output which fails schema validation. May be a downstream regression of the path-resolution fix.
new_findings.action: Note for B43 lead-coder review. Not attributing — inferred from history; needs events.jsonl + trace to confirm.
